_comment: Dialable phone numbers/codes → events. Keys are matched case-INSENSITIVELY and with whitespace stripped. Fields: name (messenger; '' = no name shown), text (message body — the English text doubles as the localization key in lang/ja.lua), sound (a stem in the STAGE's Sounds/ folder e.g. myroom/Sounds/egg.ogg, played with no message when there is no text), effect ('bombs' = the Canabi bomb-storm). Any number NOT listed here falls back to the 'nobody picks up' placeholder. Add story-mode easter eggs here without touching code.

canabi.name: Dashy
canabi.text: DIE DIE DIE DIE GET OUT OF MY HEAD KILL ILL KILL
